content: How does it help you to brag that you are a free man? Don't you still have to pay taxes on time although they are revolting to you?
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by whitefishglobal (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:In che modo ti aiuta vantarti di essere un uomo libero﹖ Non devi comunque pagare le tasse in tempo anche se le trovi riv
